scripts.build: prisma generate && prisma db push && npm run db:seed:maybe && next build
scripts.setup: npm run prisma:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:push: npm run use:postgres && prisma db push
scripts.dev:pg: npm run use:postgres && prisma generate && prisma db push && next dev
scripts.vercel-build: npm run use:postgres && prisma generate && next build
scripts.db:deploy: npm run use:postgres && prisma generate && prisma db push && npm run db:seed:maybe
